title: impatiens kamerunensis subsp. obanensis
intro: Impatiens kamerunensis subsp. obanensis, also known as the Oban Balsam or Oban Impatiens, is a plant species in the family Balsamaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, and is used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Impatiens kamerunensis subsp. obanensis include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in water or as a decoction, and are used to treat a range of health conditions.
